subcodes.first_line: O thou precious, pure and sanctified soul! The Lord of Hosts hath sustained thee, before Whom necks have bowed down in submission [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها النفس النفیسه الزکیه الطاهره ایدک رب الجنود قد خضعت الاعناق و ذلت
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @predictions and prophecies
